failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    p.id AS profile_id, 
    p.username, 
    p.full_name
FROM profile p
JOIN profile_relationship pr ON p.id = pr.destination_profile_id
JOIN profile follower ON pr.origin_profile_id = follower.id
WHERE 
    follower.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'influencer')
    AND p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'restaurant | cafe | bistro | eatery')
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;
failed_attempts.error: Query executed successfully but returned 0 rows — the filter may be too restrictive. Consider: OR instead of AND between separate concepts, dropping an overly specific constraint, or a broader tsquery.
